name: Scrape Instagram Reels to Google Sheets

nodes.name: Run and Get Results / 运行并取结果
Normalize & Score / 标准化与评分
Append Rows to Sheet / 追加到表格

parameters.content:
## Instagram Reels → Google Sheets

Scrape reel data by Reel URL via CoreClaw, score each by engagement (likes + comments + plays on a viral-reel scale), append to the **Reels** sheet.

Edit **Input Config**: one or more Reel URLs (comma/space separated).

Bind credentials:
- CoreClaw API (Run node)
- Google Sheets OAuth2 (Append node)

main.node: Run and Get Results / 运行并取结果
Normalize & Score / 标准化与评分
Append Rows to Sheet / 追加到表格

description: Scrape reel data by Reel URL via CoreClaw, score each by engagement (likes + comments + plays on a viral-reel scale), append structured rows to a Google Sheet.
